en.title: Amenhotep III
en.extract: Amenhotep III, also known as Amenhotep the Magnificent or Amenhotep the Great and Hellenized as Amenophis III, was the ninth pharaoh of the Eighteenth Dynasty. According to different authors following the "Low Chronology", he ruled Ancient Egypt from June 1386 to 1349 BC, or from June 1388 BC to December 1351 BC/1350 BC, after his father Thutmose IV died. Amenhotep was Thutmose's son by a minor wife, Mutemwiya.
en.description: Ninth Pharaoh of the Eighteenth dynasty of Egypt

ar.title: أمنحتب الثالث
ar.extract: أمنحتِپ الثالث هو تاسع فراعنة الأسرة الثامنة عشر، ومن أعظم حكام مصر على مر التاريخ. حكم مصر في الفترة ما بين أو
